div.p: Protocol: MSR-Queue-CAS-V1 Module: lock_free_queue.c Linearization Point: The load of next_ptr at Step 3 (if NULL).

All loads in Steps 1-3 MUST use memory_order_acquire. On x86_64, these are plain MOV instructions (as x86 provides acquire/release semantics by default). On ARMv8, these require LDAR instructions to prevent Step 3 from being reordered before Step 1.
Empty queue detection is generally ABA-safe because we do not perform a CAS to pop a node when it is empty. We only return a status code.
This ensures that the sentinel node at head_old hasn't been popped and re-pushed (ABA) or freed during the observation window.
